meaning: adj.不注意的,疏忽的,无意中做的
examples: The government has said it was an inadvertent error.
Norton GoBack is the perfect tool for random system crashes, failed installations, and inadvertent deletions.
Google has said the data collection was inadvertent.
Its slow-motion, pythonesque squeeze was initially inadvertent, but then, about two years ago, deliberate.
You spoke of the inadvertent release of the fact that the suspect was now cooperating.
